name: ENTRAVISION COMMUNICATIONS CORP
business: Entravision Communications Corp sells advertising through television, radio, and digital media, and provides global performance marketing solutions primarily to mobile app developers. It owns and operates Spanish-language television and radio stations concentrated in 13 of the 20 highest-density Latino markets in the United States.

exposures.sentence: investments in the AI capabilities of our platform and increased sales capacity enabled ATS to increase monthly active advertisers and revenue per monthly active advertiser.
In general, the traditional broadcast industry is continuing to experience dramatic transformation.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures of approximately $8.0 million during full year 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that our capital expenditures will be approximately $8.0 million during the full year 2026.
